merlin_thesis: NAS100 is in extreme premium at 30,304.6 after a 5-day bullish impulse from the May 19 low (28,596). Price has broken above the D1 dealing range high (29,705) and is now in extension territory at 154% FIB. While macro structure remains BULLISH (HH/HL), the last D1 candle shows only 15% body (indecision), H4 is in tight compression (144pt range at 91.8% premium), and no M15 entry signal exists. The 5-day rally without a pullback suggests exhaustion. Daily bias history shows flip from Bearish→Bullish→Neutral-Bearish→now extended. No trade recommended until pullback into discount.
reasoning: No TA input received from Walker
